text:
Once upon a time, in a sleepy little village surrounded by whispering forests and deep blue oceans, there lived a curious duck named Dulcie. Dulcie didn't mind being quirky; she believed each day to be a mystery in itself. One day, she heard tales from the local rooster about a magical nut that could grant three wishes.

Driven by curiosity, Dulcie plucked off her feathers and skipped over to the ancient birch tree where the nut lay hidden beneath an antelope quilt of daisies. As she bit into it—

"Whoopee!" She blinked her huge eyes. Her first wish was for an evening filled with butterflies—so many, she couldn't count. They danced around her, buzzing and sparkling. For her second wish, she wanted to visit the stars. She climbed atop a haystack and felt their warmth.

"I wish I could dance with all the stars!" Her voice sang through the night.

And for her third wish, she wished to know the secret
